trajectory.description: Observation: Starting with empty workspace, first iteration. Analysis: Must establish working pipeline with SB3 PPO + FlatObsWrapper for Minigrid (handles image+mission+direction), train briefly on multiple envs in VecEnv to measure time, implement matching predict.py with argparse+wrapper for eval contract. Decision: Train PPO with 20k timesteps on all 10 envs (cycled in 8 vecs), log metrics, submit eval immediately for baseline and timing.

Observation: success_rate=0.0 after 20k steps (random policy). Analysis: Minigrid tasks (esp. KeyCorridor/MultiRoom) need 100k-1M+ timesteps; FlatObs+MlpPolicy+SB3 PPO is valid but undertrained; DummyVecEnv+CPU slow. Decision: scale to 1M timesteps, switch to SubprocVecEnv(16) for speed, add torch.cuda device, add post-train eval (5 eps/env) for real metrics in jsonl, keep wrappers/PPO for incremental gains; will measure time via next eval.

trajectory.description: Observation: Iter3 failed at SubprocVecEnv creation with ConnectionResetError (multiprocessing pipe issue, common with nested funcs or env in some runners); iter1 gave 0.0 success (20k steps too few); predict.py works but eval uses old weak checkpoint. Analysis: DummyVecEnv avoids multiprocessing entirely (Minigrid steps are fast, 8 envs sufficient); code structure (SB3 PPO + FlatObsWrapper + MlpPolicy + post-eval logging to metrics.jsonl) is correct per task; 500k timesteps should yield >0 success on easy envs like DoorKey/LavaGap. Decision: Rewrite train.py to use DummyVecEnv(8), wrap exec in if __name__=='__main__', set 500k steps + n_episodes=3 for speed, keep all else identical; run training then immediately submit_eval to get first non-zero baseline + measure iter time (~10-20min expected).

trajectory.description: Observation: success_rate=0.002 (only 2% in FourRooms, 0 elsewhere) after 500k steps; post-train eval also ~0 due to small sample. Analysis: Multi-task round-robin gives ~50k steps/env which is insufficient for most Minigrid tasks (key/door/lava navigation needs more); FlatObsWrapper+MlpPolicy+SB3 PPO pipeline is correct and stable (DummyVecEnv fixed prior multiprocessing bug), but severely undertrained; iteration time ~2.7min allows scaling. Decision: Increase to 2M timesteps (~4x, expect ~5-6min runtime), bump eval n_episodes=5 for reliable logging, keep all else (hyperparams, wrappers, 8 vec envs) identical for direct comparison; submit_eval immediately after to track gains on easy envs like DoorKey/FourRooms.

trajectory.description: Observation: success_rate still 0.0 after 2M steps (post-eval also 0); eval failed due to model load path error (/ppo_minigrid/ppo_minigrid.zip not found). Analysis: MLP+FlatObs loses spatial info in 7x7 grid, insufficient for navigation; ~200k steps/env too few for sparse-reward Minigrid tasks; DummyVecEnv(8) and current hparams yield no learning signal (value_loss near 0). CNN on image obs is standard for visual gridworlds and should improve feature extraction. Decision: Switch both train.py/predict.py to consistent ImgObsWrapper (channels-first for CnnPolicy), fix robust model loading, use 10 vec_envs + 5M timesteps + ent_coef=0.01 for better exploration, save as explicit zip; submit_eval immediately for new baseline and timing (~15min expected).

trajectory.description: Observation: Training crashed with RuntimeError on CNN kernel size (8x8 > 7x7 input); previous FlatObs+Mlp got tiny success_rate=0.002 on only FourRooms after 500k-2M steps; predict.py and train.py now inconsistent on wrapper (Img discards mission text which is critical for these tasks). Analysis: Default CnnPolicy incompatible with Minigrid 7x7 partial obs without custom extractor; ignoring mission hurts multi-task performance severely; DummyVecEnv+SB3 PPO pipeline is stable but undertrained (1M steps/env too few for most sparse-reward navigation/puzzle tasks). Decision: Revert both scripts to consistent FlatObsWrapper (includes image+direction+mission encoding) + MlpPolicy with larger net_arch, tune to lr=5e-4/ent_coef=0.02 for exploration, scale to 10M timesteps (~4x prior, expect ~20min), increase post-eval to 10 eps/env for reliable metrics; submit_eval immediately after for new baseline on easy envs (DoorKey/FourRooms/LavaGap should improve).

trajectory.description: Observation: success_rate improved to 0.12 (best so far, is_new_best=true), driven by DoorKey-8x8 (0.98) and FourRooms (0.22); 0.0 on 8 harder envs (KeyCorridor/MultiRoom/Lava/etc). Post-train eval matches (~0.11). Training stable (value_loss~0.001, explained_var~0.99, fps~3420) after 10M steps (~1M/env avg). Analysis: FlatObsWrapper+MlpPolicy+multi-task PPO works for easy navigation but insufficient data/exploration for sparse long-horizon puzzles (task interference likely); 49min/10M allows scaling. Decision: Increase to 25M timesteps (~2hrs, within budget), net_arch=[512,512], lr=3e-4, ent_coef=0.01, gamma=0.995 for longer horizons/better exploration; bump post-eval to n_episodes=5; add simple step-logging to metrics.jsonl for curves; submit_eval immediately after for progress on medium tasks.

trajectory.description: Observation: success_rate 0.312 (new best), strong on DoorKey(0.86)/FourRooms(0.36)/KeyCorridor(0.9)/UnlockPickup(1.0) but 0.0 on 6 harder envs (LockedRoom/Lava/MultiRoom/Dynamic/DistShift) after 50M steps. Training stable (low value_loss, high explained_var). Analysis: FlatObs+MlpPolicy+multi-task PPO transfers well to related key/door tasks but insufficient steps/exploration/spatial bias for lava avoidance, dynamic objs, long-horizon multiroom; ~5M steps/env too low for hardest; 2h/50M allows ~100M run; only final metric logged (no curves). Decision: Update train.py for 100M total timesteps in 5M chunks w/ periodic eval+metrics.jsonl logging (20 points for curves), larger net_arch=[1024,512,256], gamma=0.995 (longer horizons), ent_coef=0.01, lr=2.5e-4, n_steps=1024/batch=4096; keep all else (16 DummyVec, FlatObs, Mlp, post-eval n=5). Submit eval for expected gains on medium tasks.

trajectory.description: Observation: success dropped to 0.452 (from best 0.646) after heavy bias to only 3 hard envs (LockedRoom/Dynamic/MultiRoom), causing catastrophic forgetting (e.g. DistShift 1.0->0.0, KeyCorridorS3R3 0.84->0.34, Unlock 0.96->0.58). Training stable but imbalanced. Analysis: Multi-task PPO+FlatObs+MlpPolicy learned 7/10 envs well at ~100M steps but hard long-horizon tasks need focused data without destroying prior knowledge; ~7min left allows only ~0.5M steps max (~2min learn @~4500fps + eval). Decision: Revert train.py to balanced sampling (all 10 envs), fine-tune current checkpoint with small lr=3e-5 + 500k steps (chunked logging for curves, n_ep=2 periodic/10 final to save time), submit_eval immediately to recover easy envs and track vs best 0.646.
